description: Use this API to delete the specified non-transformer branch or two-winding transformer from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purgbrn(ibus, jbus, ckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the branch. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the branch. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the branch to be deleted. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
